mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.direction, t.status, t.priority, uo.real_name AS ownerDisplayName, uc.real_name AS creatorDisplayName, us.real_name AS suggestedToDisplayName, t.due_at AS dueAt FROM task_boards t LEFT JOIN users uo ON t.owner_user_id = uo.id AND uo.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users uc ON t.creator_user_id = uc.id AND uc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users us ON t.suggested_to_user_id = us.id AND us.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0
AND t.owner_user_id IN
#{uid}
ORDER BY t.due_at ASC, t.id DESC

SELECT t.id, t.task_title AS taskTitle, t.task_description AS taskDescription, t.direction, t.status, t.priority, uo.real_name AS ownerDisplayName, uc.real_name AS creatorDisplayName, us.real_name AS suggestedToDisplayName, t.due_at AS dueAt, t.owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, t.creator_user_id AS creatorUserId, t.suggested_to_user_id AS suggestedToUserId FROM task_boards t LEFT JOIN users uo ON t.owner_user_id = uo.id AND uo.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users uc ON t.creator_user_id = uc.id AND uc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users us ON t.suggested_to_user_id = us.id AND us.is_deleted = 0 WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.id = #{id}
